caption: An educational presentation on "CRYOGENIC ENGINEERING" is shown, featuring a slide titled "Tutorial – 2". The slide focuses on the "Work/unit mass of gas liquefied" and displays a T-S diagram with a cycle delineated by lines labeled "T=const", "p=const", "S=const", and "h=const". Across the sequence, the slide is incrementally updated with calculations. Initially, only the diagram and heading are visible. Then, two blue boxes appear containing the values "W/m = 463" and "y = 0.074". Finally, a mathematical equation is added at the bottom, showing the calculation "W/m_l = W/ym = 463 / 0.074 = 6265.22 J / g". The NPTEL logo is visible in the bottom-left corner, and the bottom banner identifies the presenter as "Prof. M D Atrey, Department of Mechanical Engineering, IIT Bombay".
